blocks.goal: Reduce Element's responsibility for child-node storage, caching and sibling indexing by extracting child-management helpers and the NodeList implementation into a dedicated support class so Element delegates these responsibilities.

inputs: NodeList (static final class NodeList extends ArrayList<Node>)
outputs: org.jsoup.nodes.Element (updated) - delegating methods that call ElementChildSupport
org.jsoup.nodes.ElementChildSupport.NodeList (moved or exposed) or ElementChildSupport provides accessors for NodeList
ops.details: Create org.jsoup.nodes.ElementChildSupport in the same package. Move the child element caching constants (childElsKey, childElsMod), the cachedChildren()/stashChildren()/childElementsList() implementations, NodeList inner class, and child-node indexing methods into ElementChildSupport as package-private static helpers that accept an Element argument or expose instance helpers. Leave small delegating methods in Element (e.g. childElementsList(), cachedChildren(), stashChildren()) that call ElementChildSupport so existing calls from other Element methods remain unchanged. Preserve usage of package-private fields (childNodes, attributes) by locating the new class in org.jsoup.nodes.

Update Element.java to reference ElementChildSupport methods where implementations were moved. Because new class is in same package, imports may not be required, but ensure compilation references are correct.

blocks.goal: Reduce Element's fan-out by extracting CSS selector composition and uniqueness logic into a focused helper so Element delegates selector generation.

ops.details: Move the selector-specific private helpers uniqueIdSelector, cssSelectorComponent, and safeTagName into a new ElementSelectorSupport class as package-private static methods. Update Element.cssSelector() to delegate to ElementSelectorSupport.cssSelector(this). Keep Element public API unchanged. The helper will use Element's package-private fields (attributes, tag, parent()) and call ElementQuerySupport.select if needed.

inputs: Element.cssSelector() internal calls to uniqueIdSelector and cssSelectorComponent
ops.details: Replace internal calls from Element.cssSelector() to the moved helpers with a single delegation to ElementSelectorSupport.cssSelector(this). This keeps the public signature and behavior while moving implementation.

blocks.goal: Isolate class attribute tokenization and class-list parsing utilities from Element to reduce method count and group related logic.

outputs: org.jsoup.nodes.Element (updated) - classNames(), classList(), hasClass() call tokenizer helpers
ops.details: Move the three private static tokenization helpers into ElementClassTokenizer as package-private static methods. Update Element.classNames(), Element.classList(), and Element.hasClass() to call ElementClassTokenizer.nextClassStart/nextClassEnd/classToken. Keep the public Element API unchanged so callers are unaffected.

inputs: Element.classNames(), Element.classList(), Element.hasClass() internal calls to nextClassStart/nextClassEnd/classToken
outputs: Element methods updated to call ElementClassTokenizer static helpers
ops.details: Adjust internal calls within Element to reference the new ElementClassTokenizer helpers. Because the tokenizer is in the same package, no import changes required; delegation keeps behavior identical.
